Common Questions
Everything you need to know before you sign up.
No contracts, ever. Pay month to month and cancel anytime with 30 days notice. We're confident enough in our results that we don't need to lock you in.
Absolutely. Our AI agents are built to handle 100% of your inbound calls - answering, qualifying, and booking around the clock with no human involvement required. That's the core of what we do.
Right after checkout you'll schedule your onboarding call. On that call we gather your scripts, CRM login, scheduling rules, and any special instructions. Our team builds your setup overnight. Within 48 hours you forward your number to us and you're live. That's it.
No. Our agents are trained on your business, answer using your scripts, and operate as a seamless extension of your team. We've been doing this for 16 years - clients consistently tell us their customers have no idea.
We've integrated with 80+ CRM systems over 16 years - Salesforce, HubSpot, Clio, Jane App, Mindbody, GoHighLevel, and dozens more. If you use it, we almost certainly connect to it. We confirm compatibility on your onboarding call.
If you're not satisfied within the first 30 days for any reason, we'll refund your first month in full. No questions, no hassle. We've been in business since 2010 and our reputation depends on delivering results.
Yes. Payments are processed through Stripe, the same platform used by Amazon, Google, and Shopify. We never store your card details. All call data is encrypted and we're fully HIPAA compliant for medical clients.
The Team Behind Your AI Agent
Real people. Real experience.
On every account.

We're not a faceless platform. Behind every AI agent we deploy is a dedicated team that knows your business.

Angela Aprahamian
Founder & CEO

Angela founded NR Admin in 2010 and has spent the last 15+ years obsessing over one thing: helping businesses stop missing calls and start capturing every opportunity. With over a decade of software development experience - including building NR Admin's own proprietary platform from the ground up since 2015 - she saw AI coming before most and leaned in hard. Her vision: use it to make businesses run smarter, not harder. When she's not building the future of AI-powered reception, she's in Los Angeles with her husband and three kids.

Amanda Freudenberg
CMO & Partner

Amanda joined NR Admin in 2015 and never looked back. She came up through property management, where she discovered something that would define her career: a genuine love for people. That instinct translates perfectly to what she does now - growing the NR Admin brand through marketing and sales that actually connects. Amanda doesn't just run campaigns, she tells stories, and she's really good at it. As a partner and part-owner of the company, she's as invested in your success as anyone. She's all heart. Based in Houston, Texas with her husband and daughter.

Aurora Ramos
Director of Client Growth

Aurora is one of NR Admin's original team members, and it shows. After more than a decade with the company, she knows this product inside and out - and that knowledge is exactly what makes her so good at what she does. When you talk to Aurora, you're not talking to a salesperson running a script. You're talking to someone who genuinely understands your problem and knows how to solve it. She leads new business, runs demos, and has a way of making complex things feel simple. Warm, driven, and deeply knowledgeable. Based in Los Angeles with her husband and son.

Our Take on AI
Every missed call is a
missed customer. We solve that.

Studies show 60–80% of callers who reach voicemail don't leave a message - and most never call back. Your AI agent answers every call, instantly, 24/7, so that never happens to you again.

What your AI agent does
Answers every inbound call instantly, 24/7 - greets callers, books appointments, captures lead info, and routes urgent calls.
What that means for you
Your calendar fills automatically. No voicemails, no missed leads, no after-hours gaps. Every caller gets an answer.
What we handle for you
Full setup, agent training, CRM connection - live in 48 hours. You forward your number, we handle every call from there.
What's Included
What NR Admin's AI Receptionists Can Do

We customize your AI Receptionist to sound like your business, follow your rules, and help customers quickly — without you lifting a finger.

Every Call Answered
Answers every call on the 1st ring so customers aren't sent to voicemail — 24/7, without the cost of adding staff.
Handles Common Requests
Handles new customer inquiries, appointment requests, basic FAQs, and shares key business information such as location, hours, services, and service areas.
Transfers Calls
Routes calls to the appropriate person or department in your office based on the rules you set.
Backed By Humans
Calls can be escalated to one of our live Customer Care Coordinators when needed (optional).
Takes Messages
Takes detailed messages, captures key info (caller name, reason, callback number, service request, urgency), and delivers it to your team instantly.
80+ Languages Available
We can configure your AI receptionist to support multiple languages based on your customer population and call needs.
Fully Customized by NR Admin
Greetings, call flows, rules, and office-specific scripting - so the AI sounds like your office and follows your exact routing preferences. You can even select from our voice and tone choices so the agent sounds exactly like you want.
Industries We Serve
Built for any business that runs on phone calls.
Law Firms
Intake, scheduling, and lead capture for every practice area.
Home Services
HVAC, plumbing, roofing, electrical - we handle the calls so you can do the work.
Medical & Wellness
HIPAA-compliant call handling for med spas, clinics, and health practices.
Real Estate
Never miss a buyer or seller lead. We answer, qualify, and schedule showings.
Financial Services
Professional call handling for advisors, CPAs, and planning firms.
Accounting
Client intake, appointment scheduling, and follow-up for accounting and CPA firms.
Staffing Agencies
Candidate intake, interview scheduling, and client follow-up on autopilot.
Marketing & Consulting
Lead intake, consultation booking, and follow-up for agencies.
